  n = nums.length
  max_index = n - 1
  sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = sieve[1] = false
  (2..Math.sqrt(max_index)).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*i..max_index).step(i) { |j| sieve[j] = false }
    end
  end
  sumA = 0
  sumB = 0
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    if sieve[i]
      sumA += num
    else
      sumB += num
    end
  end
  (sumA - sumB).abs
end
